case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s metrics. Productcatalogservice latency.p50 dev=+2.4 and emailservice mem dev=+1.9-+2.2 show early anomalies. Redis mem dev=+2.2 is validation evidence. Root cause likely among productcatalogservice or emailservice.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 60-180s emailservice metrics. Mem dev=+1.9-+2.2 persists across windows, while latency.p50/p90 show normal validation. Trace latency.self_p99 dev=+2.4 in 120-150 window supports mem pressure propagation. Root cause remains emailservice_mem.

logs: [logs] id=L1415 window=90-120 component=emailservice template_id=26 level=INFO signal=log.count
[logs] id=L1880 window=120-150 component=emailservice template_id=26 level=INFO signal=log.count
[logs] id=L2384 window=150-180 component=emailservice template_id=26 level=INFO signal=log.count

reasoner.analysis: Emailservice memory pressure (dev=+1.9-+2.2) is the primary cause. Productcatalogservice and checkoutservice latency anomalies are secondary propagation effects.
